method. The nanoparticles were loaded with coumarin-6 (C6) as a ﬂuorescence
marker. The particles were characterized for surface morphology, particle size, zeta
potential, and for cellular uptake by

non-targeted and targeted NPs along with MTX was evaluated on MCF7, 4T1 and L929 cell lines.
